BUG-01 admissionId uniqueness should be per-school › backend duplicate-admissionId check is scoped per school (not globally)
BUG-02 pin/unpin routes must be school-scoped › pin request is only accepted after student verification confirms correct school
BUG-03 student update should reject invalid data › updating student with invalid phone number shows validation error or backend rejects
BUG-03 student update should reject invalid data › updating student with valid data succeeds
BUG-05 pagination totalPages must not be Infinity when limit=0 › student list loads without crashing when limit=0 returns Infinity totalPages
BUG-06 student list grade column should not show fake data › academic grade shown in list is not deterministically fake for a known studentId
testcase.system-out: BUG-06: A letter grade is shown in the student list — verify it comes from real API data, not a hardcoded hash of studentId.

testcase.name: BUG-07 send-reminder API endpoint coverage › reminder button in student dashboard triggers POST to send-reminder endpoint
testcase.system-out: BUG-07: send-reminder button not found OR route not called — check routes/students.js for missing POST /:id/send-reminder

testcase.name: BUG-08 zipCode validation inconsistency › form rejects zipCode longer than 6 digits before submission
BUG-09 mediumOfInstruction and house are silently dropped › create payload does not include mediumOfInstruction or house (Mongoose schema missing them)
BUG-10 duplicate rollNo should be rejected by backend › backend rejects duplicate rollNo for same class and academic year
testcase.system-out: BUG-10: Duplicate rollNo was accepted without error — unique index partial filter may be misconfigured

testcase.name: BUG-11 parent validation: empty parents array should show clear error › student creation fails gracefully when no parent is provided
